properties.Image Tags:
SELECT 	"StudyInstanceUID" AS ImageStudyUID,
		"SeriesInstanceUID" AS ImageSeriesUID,
		"SeriesNumber" AS ImageSeriesIdentifier,
		"KVP" AS KVP,
		"XRayTubeCurrent" AS XRayTubeCurrent,
		"Exposure" AS Exposure,
		"ExposureTime" AS ExposureTime,
		"FilterType" AS FilterType,
		"SliceThickness" AS SliceThickness,
		"PixelRowSpacing" AS PixelRowSpacing,
		"PixelColSpacing" AS PixelColSpacing,
		"Rows" AS ImageRows,
		"Columns" AS ImageColumns,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Image Series:
SELECT 	"StudyInstanceUID" AS ImageStudyUID,
		"SeriesInstanceUID" AS ImageSeriesUID,
		"ManufacturerModelName" AS Manufacturer,
		"StudyDescription" AS Description,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Image Study:
SELECT 	"StudyInstanceUID" AS ImageStudyUID,
		'imaging' AS ImagingProcedureIdentifier,
		"PatiendID" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"DatasetID" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
